case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MORSCH, LAVERN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORSCH, LAVERN $1,621.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,647.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
